### 🚀 About Me

Computer Engineering student at SENAI CIMATEC, full-stack developer with a passion for Python, JavaScript, and C. I build everything from terminal tools and bots to games and web interfaces. Open source advocate, creative problem solver, and professional chaos organizer.

> **"Shadow the Hedgehog is literally me!"**

🌱 **Currently diving into:** Java, Python, TypeScript

🔨 **Building:** Backrooms Online (multiplayer game), Mate Helper (AI desktop pet)

📚 **Focus:** Computer Engineering at SENAI CIMATEC — Salvador, BA (2023–2027)

### 📦 Open Source Projects

- **[HEXFEED](https://github.com/MCookinho/hexfeed)**  — Private social network in the terminal. Encrypted with Tor. Minimalist TUI built with ncurses.
- **[SHELLGAME](https://github.com/MCookinho/shellgame)**  — Collection of classic terminal games with ncurses. Includes a FNAF port.
- **[MATE-HELPER](https://github.com/MCookinho/mate-helper)**  `[ BETA ]` — AI desktop pet. A smart little virtual buddy with a personality.
- **[BACKROOMS ONLINE](https://github.com/MCookinho/Backrooms-Online)**  `[ ALPHA ]` — Multiplayer game set in the Backrooms. Explore, avoid entities, and try to escape with other players.

<sub>🔗 [See all on GitHub](https://github.com/MCookinho?tab=repositories)</sub>


---

### 🎮 Games I've Made

- **[Letral](https://letral.wtf)** — Wordle Battle Royale. Guess the secret word before others in PT-BR, EN, ES.
- **[Catfishing](https://codecrusaders.itch.io/catfishing)** — Point & Click with turn-based combat. Fish and battle against aquarium monsters.
- **[Natureba](https://codecrusaders.itch.io/natureba)** — Adventure game inspired by Monkey Island. Survive in the forest for 7 days.
- **[Cabra](https://darukee.itch.io/cabra)** — Puzzle game. Convert animals into creatures of the night without getting caught.
- **[Shell Game](https://github.com/MCookinho/shellgame)** — Classic terminal games collection with ncurses in C.

<sub>🎮 [See all on Itch.io](https://mistercookinho.itch.io)</sub>
